query.sql: SELECT p.record_id, p.channel_pf, p.channel_zs, p.channel_jt, p.channel_al, p.channel_jj, IFNULL(p.channel_pf,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_zs,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_jt,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_al,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_jj,0) AS channel_total, DATE_FORMAT(p.cost_date,'%Y-%m-%d') AS cost_date, p.channel_pf - LEAD(p.channel_pf) OVER (ORDER BY p.cost_date DESC) AS diff_pf, p.channel_zs - LEAD(p.channel_zs) OVER (ORDER BY p.cost_date DESC) AS diff_zs, p.channel_jt - LEAD(p.channel_jt) OVER (ORDER BY p.cost_date DESC) AS diff_jt, p.channel_al - LEAD(p.channel_al) OVER (ORDER BY p.cost_date DESC) AS diff_al, p.channel_jj - LEAD(p.channel_jj) OVER (ORDER BY p.cost_date DESC) AS diff_jj, (IFNULL(p.channel_pf,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_zs,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_jt,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_al,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_jj,0)) - LEAD(IFNULL(p.channel_pf,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_zs,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_jt,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_al,0) + IFNULL(p.channel_jj,0)) OVER (ORDER BY p.cost_date DESC) AS diff_total FROM pf_profit_record p WHERE p.book_id = ${@book_id} #AND_CLAUSE# ORDER BY p.cost_date DESC

collisionSql.where: exists (select 1 from pf_profit_record where cost_date = ${@cost_date} and book_id = ${@book_id})

sqls.executeSql: INSERT INTO pf_profit_record (channel_pf, channel_zs, channel_jt, channel_al, channel_jj, cost_date, book_id, create_by, create_date, last_update_by, last_update_date) VALUES (${@channel_pf}, ${@channel_zs}, ${@channel_jt}, ${@channel_al}, ${@channel_jj}, ${@cost_date}, ${@book_id}, ${@user_id}, NOW(), ${@user_id}, NOW())

collisionSql.where: exists (select 1 from pf_profit_record where cost_date = ${@cost_date} and book_id = ${@book_id} and record_id != ${@record_id})

sqls.executeSql: UPDATE pf_profit_record SET channel_pf = ${@channel_pf}, channel_zs = ${@channel_zs}, channel_jt = ${@channel_jt}, channel_al = ${@channel_al}, channel_jj = ${@channel_jj}, cost_date = ${@cost_date}, last_update_by = ${@user_id}, last_update_date = NOW() WHERE record_id = ${@record_id} and book_id = ${@book_id}
DELETE FROM pf_profit_record WHERE record_id = ${@record_id} and book_id = ${@book_id}
